mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_wear t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.check_datetime DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_wear t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.department = #{department} ORDER BY t.check_datetime DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND department = #{department}
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_wear t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.wear_status = #{status} ORDER BY t.check_datetime DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND wear_status = #{status}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_wear t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.work_zone LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.checker LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.check_datetime DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR work_zone LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR checker LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_wear t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_wear ( check_datetime, worker_name, department, work_zone, required_ppe, wear_status, checker, action_taken, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{checkDatetime}, #{workerName}, #{department}, #{workZone}, #{requiredPpe}, #{wearStatus}, #{checker}, #{actionTaken}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_wear SET check_datetime = #{checkDatetime}, worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department}, work_zone = #{workZone}, required_ppe = #{requiredPpe}, wear_status = #{wearStatus}, checker = #{checker}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_wear SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND wear_status = 'OK'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND wear_status = 'VIOLATION'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND wear_status IN ('VIOLATION', 'IMPROPER')
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN wear_status = 'OK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_count FROM tb_ppe_wear WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY department ORDER BY department
